short_description: Accident insurance scheme providing ₹2 Lakh coverage for accidental death or disability at premium of just ₹20 per year.
detailed_description: PMSBY is a one-year accident insurance scheme renewable from year to year, offering coverage for accidental death and disability. The scheme is available to people in the age group of 18 to 70 years with a savings bank account who give their consent to join and enable auto-debit. The premium of ₹20 per annum is to be deducted from the account holder's bank account through auto-debit facility in one installment on or before 1st June of each coverage year.
key_benefits: ₹2,00,000 for permanent total disability (loss of both eyes or both limbs)
₹1,00,000 for permanent partial disability (loss of one eye or one limb)
Very low premium of only ₹20 per year
other_conditions: Must have a savings bank account in participating bank
Must give consent for auto-debit of premium amount
Account should have sufficient balance for premium deduction
Coverage period is June 1 to May 31 annually
Can be enrolled through multiple bank accounts but claim only from one

REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS.description: For identity verification and KYC compliance
Active savings bank account for premium deduction
Written consent for enrollment and auto-debit authorization
To nominate beneficiary for claim settlement

application_steps_online: Visit your bank's internet banking portal or mobile app
Navigate to insurance or Jan Suraksha section
Select Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
Fill the enrollment form with personal details
Provide consent for auto-debit of ₹20 premium
Submit the form and receive enrollment confirmation
Premium will be auto-debited from account annually
application_steps_offline: Visit your bank branch where you have savings account
Request for PMSBY enrollment form from bank staff
Fill the form completely with accurate details
Provide Aadhaar number and give consent for auto-debit
Submit the form along with required documents
Ensure sufficient balance in account for premium deduction
Receive enrollment confirmation and policy details

submission_locations.address: Branch where you have savings account
submission_locations.working_days: Monday to Friday (Saturday for some banks)
submission_locations.notes: Can also enroll through bank's internet banking or mobile app

last_date: Enrollment period: June 1 to May 31 annually
validity: One year (June 1 to May 31), renewable annually
processing_time: Immediate enrollment, claims processed within 30 days

faq.question: What is covered under PMSBY?
faq.answer: Accidental death and permanent disability (total or partial) due to accident are covered. Natural death is not covered.

faq.question: Can I enroll after June 1?
faq.answer: Yes, you can enroll anytime during the year by paying full annual premium, but coverage will start from enrollment date.

faq.question: Is medical examination required?
faq.answer: No, there is no medical examination required for enrollment in PMSBY.

common_rejection_reasons: Insufficient balance in account for premium deduction
Claim not supported by proper accident documentation
tips_for_successful_application: Ensure sufficient balance in account before June 1 for auto-debit
Link Aadhaar with bank account for smooth enrollment
Renew annually by maintaining sufficient balance
Keep policy documents safe for claim purposes
